productDisplayName: Nike Men's Street Pana II White Shoe
description: Hit the urban jungle in style and comfort in these Street Pana II sneakers from nike. Based on the competition-inspired classic shoe with the ultimate in comfort, this pair speaks volumes of style and comfort.Upper Synthetic and leather upper for maximum durability and comfort Lightly padded collar for snug Fit Synthetic tongue with mesh upper and textile lining for breathability and snug fit Stitch detailing on toe box and perforated collar for added comfort and ventilation Brand mark embroidered on the heel cup for style Midsole Textile lining and cushioned footbed for impact protection Low-profile rubber midsole for added comfort Outsole Rubber outsole with cross pattern for grip and durability Vertical strip of embedded carbon rubber running across the midsole for better balance Shoe careRub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
